improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Powered by Claude. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition (Claude-powered AI assistant for trade/business) and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the link is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the starting price (US$2/day) sets expectations and qualifies clicks. All claims align with provided site context.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business) while the subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and ends with a clear, low-friction CTA referencing the free trial. The copy builds trust without overpromising and creates urgency through the specific free trial offer.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional-grade assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value included, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and encourages conversion at the critical paywall moment.
